summary: Iteration 52 - Design System Harmonization Testing: All visual consistency tests passed. Verified CSS variables, button system, form styling, card system, border-radius, shadows, and glass-morphism across Landing Page, Login Page, and Admin Dashboard. CI-Gelb (#ff9b7a) and CI-Blau (#6B8AFF) correctly implemented as primary/secondary accents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified complete design system harmonization. All CSS variables properly defined in :root (index.css). Button system (btn-primary through btn-icon) working with correct border-radius (--r-sm: 6px). Card system (nx-card, adm-stat-card, adm-health-card) using --r-md: 8px. Modal system using --r-lg: 12px. Glass-morphism (backdrop-filter: blur) applied to cards. Shadow depth system (--shadow-sm, --shadow-md, --shadow-lg) implemented. Focus rings (--shadow-focus) working on form inputs. CI-Gelb (#ff9b7a) as primary accent, CI-Blau (#6B8AFF) as secondary.

landing_page: Hero section with CTA buttons - PASSED
Hero stat cards with border-radius (6px) and backdrop-filter - PASSED
Solution cards with border-radius (8px) and backdrop-filter (blur 16px) - PASSED
Primary button with correct background (rgb(255, 155, 122)) - PASSED
login_page: Dual-role choice cards with border-radius (10px) - PASSED
Password field with focus ring shadow - PASSED
Submit button with correct styling - PASSED
admin_dashboard: Stat cards with border-radius (8px) and backdrop-filter (blur 12px) - PASSED
System Health panel with 6 health cards - PASSED
Logo remains visible in collapsed state - PASSED
Table header corners rounded (first: 8px 0px 0px, last: 0px 8px 0px 0px) - PASSED
Search field with border-radius (6px) and focus shadow - PASSED

button_system.btn-secondary: transparent with border, hover shows accent

shadow_depth_system.shadow-focus: focus ring with accent color glow
